original: a poster of a very stylish squirrel girl
Using this item will install the poster as a decoration on your ship.\n\nAccording to the signature on the back, Moira is the artist responsible for the character art.
You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...

This poster has been unlocked for decorating! You may hang it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.
translation: 这张海报已解锁，可用于装饰！你可以通过“装饰”按钮将其悬挂在飞船的特定位置，例如你的床铺、登船坡道、船员安保控制台或导航终端。

original: A poster of a dark-skinned squirrel girl with fashionable clothing and light-projected bunny ears coming out of her forehead hangs on a wall.
Celise seems fond of the woman.
